subject: [PATCH v3 3/4] nfsd: implement server-stats-get netlink handler

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch implements a netlink handler to expose NFS server statistics through the nfsd generic netlink family. The handler uses a dump operation to stream statistics across multiple netlink messages, allowing for efficient retrieval of server statistics. The patch also includes documentation and updates to various files to support this new functionality.
